Topic: Courses for You 

Heading: Find the Right Course for Where You Are 

Paragraph: DTMA offers seven targeted courses built on the 6XD framework — each designed for your specific role and objectives. Find the right course for where you are in your digital transformation journey. Featured courses displayed by customer type (Organizational Leaders, Transformation Specialists, Digital Workers) with persona-based tab filtering. Each course card shows course title, brief description, associated 6XD dimension, module count, and enrolment CTA. 

Credential Badge: Each course card includes a small KHDA-attested badge and a line reading “KHDA-attested certificate included” — indicating that completion earns a certificate attested by KHDA, Dubai. Cards should also display which credential tier the course contributes to (e.g., “Counts toward: Foundation Credential”).
